|date=[[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]<ref name="Date">Using the text of ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'', it is possible to place the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]] nineteen days after the start of the novel, and the [[Battle of Esfandia]] (and thus the end of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'') two months prior to the start of ''The Unifying Force''. The Battle of Yuuzhan'tar occurs in 64:6 per ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', and by working backwards, at the very least the Battle of Esfandia must fall in 29 ABY. ''The Final Prophecy'' also places its events as more than two years after the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], which occurs in 62:4. Thus, ''The Final Prophecy'', which occurs between ''Reunion'' and ''The Unifying Force'', must fall in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], despite ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''{{'s}} placement of it in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].</ref>

{{Quote|I think I've just about had it with Bilbringi.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="Final" />}}
The '''Second Battle of Bilbringi''', known in the planning stages as '''Operation Trinity''', was a military operation fought near the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], involving the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] and the [[Imperial Remnant]], an associate state.

==Prelude==
The [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]] was [[Attack on the Bilbringi system|captured]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

The [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]], in an effort to cut off [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] from the major [[Star system/Legends|systems]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner]] and [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rims]], launched three major attacks within a month or so of [[Time/Legends|time]]—[[Battle of the Duro system|one]] at [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], [[Battle at Fondor|another]] at [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]], and the last at [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi]]. The attack was orchestrated by [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Sien Sovv]] and three of his other [[Commander/Legends|commanders]]: [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]].

==The battle==
Dubbed as '''Operation Trinity''', the task force was divided into three groups: [[Alpha Fleet]] led by Antilles took the point, supported by [[Beta Fleet]] led by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], and [[Gamma Fleet]] led by Kre'fey. The first point of the operation was for Antilles to enter the system and scout for any weakness in the enemy fleet. Then he was to send the most tactically suitable entry points to the other two fleets.

However, just before Antilles' fleet went in, the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] released their latest creation, the [[mabugat kan]], which brought down several [[HoloNet relay/Legends|HoloNet relay stations]]. Since the entire operation depended on HoloNet transmissions to coordinate their attack, Antilles was unable to call in the other fleets for help. His fleet was trapped in a system full of hostiles, and the formation took heavy losses.

Many of his ships were destroyed in the battle, most notably the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor Cruiser]] ''[[Memory of Ithor]]'' commanded by General [[Pash Cracken]]. Antilles did inflict heavy casualties to the Yuuzhan Vong forces, destroying the Interdictors and several other vessels.

Antilles' fleet narrowly escaped being completely obliterated by the Yuuzhan Vong. Only an order by Antilles to reduce the [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']]{{'s}} shields saved the fleet. The Yuuzhan Vong retreated, thinking that the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] main reactor was going critical; along with the timely intervention of a cloaked [[Golan II Space Defense SpaceGun]] commandeered by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], it allowed ''Mon Mothma'' and the remaining vessels of Alpha Fleet to retreat to [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]].

Antilles later met up with Pellaeon's fleet after the battle was over.

Many of the captured Alliance [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] were taken by the Yuuzhan Vong to [[Selvaris]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Bilbringi makes its first appearance in ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' by [[Greg Keyes]], in which it forms one of two major plotlines.

Fleet Group Alpha, the battle group commanded by Wedge Antilles, is described as comprising less than a third of the Yuuzhan Vong force in the system, yet with at least seven capital ships commanded by Antilles and fourteen in the Yuuzhan Vong command, this sizing ratio is inaccurate.
